header.title: Design standards
header.description: Apply Atmosphere foundations, styles, and patterns to produce cohesive Boeing experiences across programs.

sections.title: Start from shared foundations
sections.description: Use strategy, typography, spacing, and layout guidance to ground every screen in the same language and hierarchy.

sections.title: Extend the visual system
sections.description: Reference color, shape, iconography, and motion guidance so new work aligns with Atmosphere’s visual identity.

sections.title: Assemble experiences with patterns
sections.description: Combine production-ready components and patterns to solve common aviation workflows without reinventing them.
